授業目的: The purpose of this course is for students to learn business fundamentals using English through situational practice, evaluation of information, and creation of new ideas
到達目標: By the end of the course students will be better able to:a)	Remember and understand main ideas and details from readings and video content through summaries, discussions, and connections  b)	Synthesize information and concepts to create new ideas through charts, diagrams, videos, and inventions c)	Analyze and evaluate information and data providing comparisons, explanations, inferences, critiques, and recommendations using discourse markers and business vocabulary  d)	Communicate through the understanding and use of gestures, eye contact and tone of voice while applying business concepts and vocabulary
授業の概要・背景:
Career English is designed to develop confident, fluent students who can successfully communicate in increasingly competitive, complex, and globalized business environments. It provides students with specific tools to accomplish strategic business goals, that will help advance their career when seeking employment, in Japan or abroad.

In this class, emphasis will be placed on organizational strategies, negotiation strategies, Multi-media presentations in business contexts, and face-to-face interaction, as well as discuss case studies and apply critical thinking skills with the relevant professional language. Students also have the opportunity to develop a new product or service as well produce a professional western style business resume, and finally participate in a job interview.
授業方法: This course will use a variety of learning activities ranging from lectures, seminars, discussions, presentations, pair work, and group work.Classes are conducted face-to-face in the classroom.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する以下の能力が養成されます。言語教育科目：１．言語コミュニケーション能力：外国語力を生かし、積極的に発信できる。２．異文化理解・多文化共生力：異文化に関する感受性をもち、多様な文化と共生できる。
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: (15%) pitch presentation;  (15%) market research presentation;  (20%) Infomercial; (30) Assignments & Participation; (20%) Mock Job Interview & Resume
